subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the recipient of divine favor! Praise be to God, the pure soul of Ahmad is the manifestation of the confirmations of the one Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشمول نظر عنایت الهی الحمد لله جان پاک احمد مظهر تاییدات رب احد است و بقول
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God
